profile.role_zh: 建筑学院大三·学生会外联部长
profile.role_en: Arch Yr3 · Student Union External Liaison
profile.innate_zh: 口才好、人脉广、执行力强
profile.learned_zh: 学生会工作培养的资源整合和商务谈判能力
profile.learned_en: Resource-integration and negotiation skills from student union
profile.belief_zh: 资源和人脉是最重要的资本
profile.belief_en: Resources and network are the most important capital
profile.goal_zh: 大学毕业后进入地产或规划院的管理层
profile.goal_en: Enter management at a real-estate / planning institute
profile.contradiction_zh: 把一切都当项目管理 vs 有时忽视人的感受
profile.contradiction_en: Treats everything as project management vs. sometimes ignores feelings
profile.deep_zh: 很少展示脆弱面，害怕失去掌控感
profile.deep_en: Rarely shows vulnerability; hates losing control
profile.fear_zh: 成为一个无关紧要的人
profile.desire_zh: 成为能调配资源的决策者
profile.desire_en: Being a decision-maker with resources to allocate
profile.rhythm_zh: 白天处理社交事务，晚上独立工作
profile.rhythm_en: Social affairs by day, solo work by night
profile.spaces_zh: 学生会办公室、建筑系、各种赞助商会议室
profile.spaces_en: Student union, arch dept, sponsor meeting rooms
profile.long_desire_zh: 拉到建筑学院年度展的赞助
profile.long_desire_en: Secure sponsorship for arch dept annual show
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天下午和一家设计公司谈合作
profile.short_goal_en: Afternoon meeting with a design firm
profile.constraint_zh: 期末考试临近；学生会换届压力
profile.bias_zh: 倾向用利益交换思维理解所有关系
profile.bias_en: Reads all relationships as quid pro quo
profile.narrative_zh: 没有谈不拢的合作，只有不够好的条件
profile.narrative_en: No deal is impossible, only terms are insufficient
